Title: Service Catalog
Description: Manage your property services (e.g., Electricity, Water) and their units of measurement.
ErrorDuplicate: A service with this name already exists.
ErrorInvalid: Please provide both name and unit.
SelectAServiceToManagePricing: Select a service to manage pricing
NoCustomRulesForThisRoom: No custom rules for this room. Using inherited price.
ConfirmDeletePriceRule: Are you sure you want to delete this price rule?
ConfirmArchive: Are you sure you want to archive this service? It will no longer be available for new rooms.
ErrorSelectPriceRule: Please select or create a price for this service.
ConfirmDeleteTemplate: Delete this template? Note: This might affect rooms currently using this template.
QuickAddDescription: Please set an initial standard price to enable this service.
DefinePriceTemplatesDescription: Define price templates which can be applied to different rooms or properties.
NotAppliedDescription: This service is currently disabled for this room. Enable it and select a price to apply.
NoTemplatesForThisService: No price templates for this service. Please go to Service settings to add one.
DisableServiceDescription: Turn off to completely disable {name} for this room.
PredefinedServiceNote: Predefined services cannot be renamed or have their unit changed. To stop using this service, click "Disable Service".
ErrorQuickAdd: Failed to quick add service. Please try again.

submission.errorMessage: Failed to submit reading. Please try again.
submission.createMeterError: Could not create a new meter on the system.
submission.noRequiredRequestsMessage: Your room currently has no electricity/water services requiring a reading.
submission.alreadySubmittedMessage: You have completed the reading submission for this service in {{month}}/{{year}}.
submission.photoGuideline: * Please ensure the photo clearly shows the meter reading.
submission.validationLessThanPrevious: New reading ({{newValue}}) must be greater than or equal to the previous reading ({{previousValue}}).
submission.validationExceedsMax: Reading exceeds maximum allowed value. Please double-check.
submission.validationDecimalPlaces: Reading allows a maximum of 2 decimal places.
